ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, machine learning) */,
  "time_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon for the model (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of training data */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data point */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecast model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "point_forecast" REAL /* Point forecast value */,
  "lo_80" REAL /* Lower bound of the 80% confidence interval */,
  "hi_80" REAL /* Upper bound of the 80% confidence interval */,
  "lo_95" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "hi_95" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast data was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the forecast data was last updated */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value for the forecast date */,
  "forecast_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon of the forecast */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the forecast value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the forecast */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the changes in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_period" TEXT /* Period over which the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_group" TEXT /* Grouping of categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data-source link */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_sources_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES forecast_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data_categories" (
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data-category link */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES forecast_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_categories_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_comments_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
